Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Blackflame is a potent, violent Path designed for war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Path does not demand a great degree of control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Blackflame madra can cause users to lose their reason or become twisted husks in later years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflames had attendants and family members on many different Paths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The vital aura in the caves is thick with the power of Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The stone tablet contains the history of the Blackflames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon possesses Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame madra causes Lindon's muscles to burn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame can be called into madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame aura can cause blockages in the soul during cycling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon can almost form a ball of Blackflame between his hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflames fell fifty years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame is a type of fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Using Blackflame erodes the soul and destroys advancement, sanity, and lifespan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Blackflame can be used to drill through stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Blackflame can destroy dummies in the Ruler Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Blackflame raced through Lindon's madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Blackflame can burn through straps.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflames drove the Tanaban clan to extinction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Blackflame does not give way to the scripted stone beneath the wooden wall panels in Lindon's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Blackflame is a concept or type of person mentioned in relation to how Jai Long views Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon can spray Blackflame from a punch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Blackflame is a Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Blackflame can be used to break down extra bindings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Blackflame madra is known for piercing defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Blackflame is a type of madra/energy Lindon remembers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackflame is one of the entities in Naru Gwei's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame is a name used to refer to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is cycling Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame is a destructive power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame can feed on blood aura.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame completed a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — A Blackflame is considered a potentially dangerous liability by the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon began cycling Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Blackflame is a path that urges the user to fight for dominance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has totally exhausted his Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Blackflame is a Path that is hard to hide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon trains the Blackflame technique under Orthos' supervision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Blackflame can taint the flavor of roasted meat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — The Spirit Well is beneficial for Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Pure madra feels more like water than Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Blackflame is a type of madra that can be cycled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Blackflame helped heal Orthos's spirit and restored his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's Blackflame madra was split by a black wedge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame madra calls fire aura to the user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon has Blackflame blazing behind him.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon relies almost entirely on Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame can slide back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame can change the nature of an experiment when used to seal a construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Blackflame is associated with the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Blackflame ignited on the Emperor's blade.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon calls Blackflame into his palms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame is a bar of energy used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame provides explosive strength to Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Goldsign of the main Path of Black Flame is a tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame burned through Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Blackflame madra is hot enough to sear the spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses Blackflame fireball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon can Forge Blackflame madra.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The corpse becomes Blackflame, transforming into black fire and a spirit of black-and-red madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Blackflame can be sent out in thin bars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon draws on Blackflame for strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Blackflame can make a shield smolder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Blackflame is described as a ravenous fire that leaves nothing behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon could switch from pure madra to Blackflame easily.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — A bar of Blackflame slices the security constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Blackflame can be used to burn water away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — A thin bar of Blackflame scorched a line in the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon channeled Blackflame into dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Crystallized Blackflame madra covered Lindon's left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon used a tongue of Blackflame to slice through space.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's Blackflame madra is in decent supply.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon uses Blackflame to cover Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Blackflame adds deadly force and destructive intention to weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used Blackflame on the ghostly images.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon has Blackflame scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses a liquid bar of Blackflame to melt stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — A bar of Blackflame shot up into the sky.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon switched back to Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon drilled a bar of Blackflame through the Archlady's stomach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Blackflame is a dark liquid flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon used Blackflame to carve scripted boxes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — A bar of Blackflame pierced the Silent King's halo and skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — A bar of Blackflame shot through the portal toward Tiberian's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Blackflame was shot through the Dreadgod's head by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon's eyes once darkened only with Blackflame.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon possesses the fury of Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses Blackflame to incinerate a ruined syringe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos wondered if he could hit Dross with Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Blackflame can burst through an Archlady’s shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Blackflame gathers around Lindon's left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Blackflame flared in Orthos's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Blackflame aura can produce dark tornadoes of flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses a two-handed blast of Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon's meeting-space was more inviting than if he had made it from Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 38''' — Lindon uses bars of Blackflame from each hand.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Blackflame boils in Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon sent a line of Blackflame at the Silverlord's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses Blackflame to burn a man's beard and scorch a wall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
